creator: martys1oi@att.net
text:
The machine I'm working on was recently upgraded from FreeBSD 13.2 to 14.0 using freebsd-update -r 14.0-RELEASE upgrade. It has gcc10 version 10.3.0 and the default compiler clang version 16.0.6. The file char_traits.h is located at:

/usr/local/lib/gcc10/include/c++/bits/char_traits.h

I suspect that the file is no longer available to or part of the clang collection or there's a symbolic link or environment variable that no longer points to it. I need help in investigating the problem. I also see the error when attempting to compile port textproc/html2text and I've reported this to them.
